description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is finished in light gray or white siding, with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The house features a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and wooden fencing for privacy. Several trees and landscaped elements are present around the property, enhancing its suburban appeal. The main entryway is prominent, with double doors and large glass panels, flanked by wide windows and a garage on one side. The rooftop includes open terraces and multiple outdoor living spaces, suggesting a focus on both indoor and outdoor comfort.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a backyard pool area, surrounded by wooden fencing and landscaping.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and wooden fencing, as well as the house's flat roof and multiple terraces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with double doors, large windows, and an attached garage, with a tree and landscaping in front.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the house's tall, flat facade, minimal window openings, and the backyard pool area extending to the right.
description_view_3: Angled view of the backyard and rear facade, showing extensive patio seating, pool, and the house's large glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with wide sidelights, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean modern lines
